questions.title: Know Me Survey
questions.description: This assignment is about helping us know you better and helping you improve your proficiency. Please answer as openly as you feel. (Share only what you feel comfortable sharing). Thank you!

questions.title: Simple Present and Present Continuous
questions.label: Tell me about yourself, your family, and what you are passionate about / Cuénteme sobre usted, su familia sobre lo que es apasionado en hacer

questions.title: Simple Past
questions.label: Tell me about a thing you did that you felt the most proud of / Cuénteme sobre algo que hizo usted de lo cual se siente orgullo

questions.title: Future
questions.label: Tell me about one of your biggest wishes for your future / Cuénteme sobre su mayor deseo en el futuro

questions.title: Present Perfect
questions.label: What has God been for you? Share your feelings or thoughts with me of what is for you. / ¿Qué ha sido Dios para usted? Comparta conmigo sus sentimientos o pensamientos de lo que es para usted en su experiencia.

questions.title: Picture
questions.label: Please share a picture with me to know you better / Por favor comparta una foto conmigo para conocerle mejor

questions.title: Consentimiento para compartir mis respuestas
questions.label: Acepto esta actividad para usar mis respuestas para mejorar el curso, ser corregido y para otros fines educativos colectivos y de uso propio de Titulino para con otros alumnos.

questions.title: Know Me Survey
questions.description: This assignment is about helping us know you better and helping you improve your proficiency. Please answer as openly as you feel. (Share only what you feel comfortable sharing). Thank you!

questions.title: Simple Present and Present Continuous
questions.label: Tell me about yourself, your family, and what you are passionate about / Cuénteme sobre usted, su familia sobre lo que es apasionado en hacer

questions.title: Consentimiento para compartir mis respuestas
questions.label: Acepto esta actividad para usar mis respuestas para mejorar el curso, ser corregido y para otros fines educativos colectivos y de uso propio de Titulino para con otros alumnos.

questions.title: Know Me — Chapter 1
questions.description: This is your first Know Me assignment for the Speeches course. Write freely and naturally — this is a great opportunity to practice your English and let us get to know you better.

questions.title: Introducing Yourself
questions.label: Write a short introduction about yourself. Who are you, where are you from, and what do you do? / Escribe una breve introducción sobre ti. ¿Quién eres, de dónde eres y qué haces?

questions.title: A Topic That Matters to You
questions.label: If you had to give a 2-minute speech today, what topic would you choose and why? / Si tuvieras que dar un discurso de 2 minutos hoy, ¿qué tema elegirías y por qué?

questions.title: Consent to share my answers
questions.label: I agree to allow Titulino to use my answers for course improvement, correction, and collective educational purposes.

questions.title: Know Me — Chapter 3
questions.description: Speeches are about connecting with your audience. This week, we want to know more about how you communicate and what drives you.

questions.title: Connecting With Others
questions.label: Describe a time you had to explain something important to someone. How did you make sure they understood you? / Describe una vez que tuviste que explicarle algo importante a alguien. ¿Cómo te aseguraste de que te entendiera?

questions.title: Persuasion
questions.label: Write about something you believe in strongly enough to persuade others. Use facts, feelings, or stories to make your case. / Escribe sobre algo en lo que creas con suficiente fuerza como para persuadir a otros.

questions.title: Consent to share my answers
questions.label: I agree to allow Titulino to use my answers for course improvement, correction, and collective educational purposes.

questions.title: Know Me — Chapter 5
questions.description: Halfway through! This week we focus on stories — one of the most powerful tools in public speaking.

questions.title: Your Story
questions.label: Tell me a real story from your life — something that changed how you see the world. / Cuéntame una historia real de tu vida — algo que cambió la forma en que ves el mundo.

questions.title: The Lesson
questions.label: What lesson from that story would you share in a speech to inspire others? / ¿Qué lección de esa historia compartirías en un discurso para inspirar a otros?

questions.title: Consent to share my answers
questions.label: I agree to allow Titulino to use my answers for course improvement, correction, and collective educational purposes.

questions.title: Know Me — Chapter 7
questions.description: Great speakers adapt to their audience. This week we explore your awareness of others and your communication style.

questions.title: Adapting Your Message
questions.label: Have you ever had to change how you said something because of who was listening? Describe that moment. / ¿Alguna vez tuviste que cambiar cómo dijiste algo por quién estaba escuchando? Describe ese momento.

questions.title: A Speaker You Admire
questions.label: Think of someone — a pastor, teacher, leader, or public figure — whose way of speaking you admire. What makes them effective? / Piensa en alguien cuya forma de hablar admiras. ¿Qué los hace efectivos?

questions.title: Consent to share my answers
questions.label: I agree to allow Titulino to use my answers for course improvement, correction, and collective educational purposes.

questions.title: Know Me — Chapter 9
questions.description: You're near the finish line! This week's essay is about vision — where you are going and how you talk about it.

questions.title: Your Vision
questions.label: Describe where you see yourself in 5 years. Be as specific and vivid as possible — paint the picture with words. / Describe dónde te ves en 5 años. Sé lo más específico y vívido posible.

questions.title: A Call to Action
questions.label: Write the closing lines of a speech you would give to motivate someone you care about to pursue their dream. / Escribe las líneas finales de un discurso que darías para motivar a alguien que te importa a perseguir su sueño.

questions.title: Consent to share my answers
questions.label: I agree to allow Titulino to use my answers for course improvement, correction, and collective educational purposes.

questions.title: Know Me — Chapter 11 (Final)
questions.description: This is your final Know Me for the Speeches course. Reflect on your journey and share what you have learned about yourself as a communicator.

questions.title: Your Growth
questions.label: Looking back at this course, how has your confidence in speaking English changed? Give a specific example of progress you have made. / Mirando atrás en este curso, ¿cómo ha cambiado tu confianza al hablar inglés? Da un ejemplo específico de tu progreso.

questions.title: Your Final Message
questions.label: If you could give one speech to the world right now, what would you say? Write the opening paragraph. / Si pudieras dar un discurso al mundo ahora mismo, ¿qué dirías? Escribe el párrafo de apertura.

questions.title: A Picture of You
questions.label: Share a photo that represents who you are today. / Comparte una foto que represente quién eres hoy.

questions.title: Consent to share my answers
questions.label: I agree to allow Titulino to use my answers for course improvement, correction, and collective educational purposes.
